---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Deadlocked Over NEET Row and Legislative Business"
date: 2026-07-23T10:36:58.657965+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces intense disruptions as the NEET paper leak row triggers rival protests, while the government moves to debate the Supreme Court Judges Bill"
run_time_ist: "4:06PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:06PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> The Monsoon Session remains stalled as the Opposition and NDA engage in heated face-offs and rival protests over the NEET paper leak, with both sides accusing the other of avoiding a formal debate.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxOUmJCNnZRU3R6ang0cWhGbnZRN1FwSU5lNWZnSEJPVk9NTlZMbU5qTDFJS3hlNldQUlZSTERXaUwwSXRkVTBVZWVad04ydHIyak1wcngzMzRNRmpULUVWZ3R0b1liRTVELUZIbHBnVHl2WXZOX0hyYWNDN1lPOEZsY1VxdW5fcHcyY1pSQVRvdWM1SUtQdjRrdXJITHM4YzMtSnh0bg?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I17</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I28</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I30</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxNZWFtV0g5eGNUVlg2b2x6THJaQ0lWR29aRUV5U3lKMHhmU1phLWpYb1N2bGhoX3B0bWVqMlN5R0lLU1NNMTdUTHJmSFp1YzFRWUVoS0ZWYjVCdjNBc2RmczBBXzZOUmFsOXRyd3pxMzJxc2VwWjFCNDV6dmRwZE9QSWZhd1JOOHhnd18xZWN2UUhFaVNTakgyNUxETXlfLXdjd3NDanlmeFd3VHIy?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I32</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxQU2daU0VZNUxGNzh4blBqc2IwTVFQZlF3Z0o2SDk4SDFKbDNJbGtNU2RUZm84YVFLeTJYMkdmUjU3dkhBdlAtWkh4QzF0cU5DVFJfZ2dfQmlzUjBFUzdfaVBja3FKSlNTdWVhZXV6bWVCLXpxbmZiWjd5NFJac0FjN0tIS0ltTmc3SmtBZ2JTcld6aFdPRHRLUTR6RDBOdmZncHQyY2VCSThQY01FVlVkQzNSWjVIT00?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I35</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxNVk5vTnBILWhjMV9aZkNlV1dxY0NucWdFb0dGZVkwZ3NMY1FUWWNaSmd3b0c0VlN2Z0k1em9xME5lbnM3aDZMak1rMFFIQUJmVW1GRVFDVDdsU1NHOGdQbnRjT2lyR2VPZ0NNNGhIQVg1TDdPNWZ5aVBabFlZemVZcTlrcDdPTUgxbVB6cjV3aHdkRUlIZnoxU3F4WGNUUXNZQlVrWWhxMkM0UVZBQ01qOTBINDcyLVN0SEduWWpCYWU5QnlWT1ZPbFpIQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I36</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative agenda:</strong> Despite ongoing disruptions, the Lok Sabha is set to take up the Supreme Court Judges Amendment Bill for debate today.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiogFBVV95cUxNbjlKMmFPZ0wtRnlGU2tqemhNbG5IQUw1WlctdjFDTG52TkFBSDBySlR4bjNINWpaREZHVTJJS0RKaTBYTXpNVkkzNDFvcWNZWTdzTHoya1RjNmJtcEFwNXBhbHhHNWp6WmJRWmJ2cVdVZDNaYmFXR3laZHBDQ2NhUnE4NGQ5X0ZsSkh6cEhRTE9Fd0hOREt5MDVsWWpnREpnWmc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial intervention:</strong> The Supreme Court has set aside the bail granted to Sonam Raghuvanshi in the Meghalaya murder case, ordering her to surrender within three weeks.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi--?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I22</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipwFBVV95cUxPMnRMejdWMG1oYWxXc1pEWEVZbWtFQXlqTnVsZmlQTldnM3pod2tLTmNGLVoyQjNjZWUta0FERElsMjF4OEdrMnJvaWZPVDdoVWppVFVnUDZ5YVJMQ2gyc3BpUWttaWc4Qlk3Z0E5R09mdmZzbE15Q2ZuWkVnTG4wcVJYWVN5c09oY2F1Z3NkS243NUwzaGpPeFAyellEU0o0VDdTV1d3MA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I25</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I26</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I27</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Government stance:</strong> BJP leadership and Union ministers have challenged the Opposition to debate the NEET issue in Parliament, while defending the Prime Minister&#x27;s proposal for fast-track courts to handle paper leak cases.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W15</a></span></li>
</ul>
